name: Tam Yam Gai (Chicken Coconut Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 stalks lemon grass, bottom 6 inches only, sliced very thin
2 cups chicken breast, no skin, no bone, R-T-C, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a mortar and pestle or food processor, make a paste of the lemongrass, shallots, garlic, galangal, cilantro stems, and peppercorns. Set aside.
2. In a wok, heat the coconut milk until almost boiling. Stir in the paste you set aside earlier, mixing well.
3. Add the chicken chunks to the pot and stir over medium heat until nearly cooked through.
4. Mix in the fish sauce, lime juice, Kaffir lime leaves, and serrano peppers. Continue stirring for a few more minutes until the chicken is fully cooked.
5. Serve hot with steamed rice.
